Meaning.Vi: Quả chanh dây (chanh vàng); vôi sống (CaO)
Meaning.En: A small, round, green citrus fruit with acidic juice, or a white, caustic, alkaline solid (calcium oxide) used in industry and agriculture.
Meaning.Example: She squeezed a lime into her margarita for extra tang.

Situation.Vi: Pha đồ uống hoặc làm nước chấm với nước cốt chanh dây
Situation.En: Using fresh lime juice to flavor drinks or dipping sauces in Southeast Asian cuisine.

Situation.Vi: Trộn vôi sống vào đất để khử chua
Situation.En: Applying agricultural lime (calcium oxide) to acidic soil to raise its pH.

Meaning.Vi: Quả chanh (chanh xanh), thường chỉ chanh Mỹ (Citrus aurantiifolia)
Meaning.En: A specific type of small, seedless, green citrus fruit, commonly used in cocktails and cooking, especially in the Americas.
Meaning.Example: He garnished the fish with a wedge of lime.

Situation.Vi: Trang trí món ăn hoặc nước uống bằng miếng chanh xanh
Situation.En: Serving grilled shrimp with a lime wedge on the side for squeezing.

Situation.Vi: Chiết xuất tinh dầu từ vỏ chanh xanh trong công nghiệp mỹ phẩm
Situation.En: Extracting lime essential oil from the peel for use in perfumes and cleaning products.
